cluster-osd-001.details: Customer replaced default IngressController with custom configuration that removed required annotations. Cluster operator unable to reconcile.

cluster-multi-001.details: Customer applied NetworkPolicy in openshift-route-monitor-operator namespace that blocks egress to monitoring endpoints. Console SLO probes may produce false positives.

cluster-acked-001.details: Customer modified kube-apiserver configuration via unsupported mechanism. API server audit logging and admission webhook chain may be impacted.
